posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Join the co-founder of monday WorkForms for the first ever WorkForms community session!

Since its first release in 2022, WorkForms has become an integral tool for teams conducting surveys and collecting data. In this session, we’ll explore the origins, the current landscape, and the WorkForm features coming soon. Sign up now!

The power of monday AI1920×1920 129 KB
